meaning: adj.恭敬的,尊敬的,尊重人的,有礼貌的
examples: He was very respectful at home and obedient to his parents.
The children in our family are always respectful to their elders.
They are respectful to their parents.
There was neither disappointment in loss nor smugness in victory, just a silent, respectful return to their positions.
Was it appropriate and respectful to celebrate the sport of football just five days later?
